goal: Ensures sufficient sample size for statistically valid estimates
description: Validates the number of instances of an entity to achieve adequate statistical power.

qualityDimension.source: Data Management Body of Knowledge DAMA-DMBOK

statementTemplate: In the %entityName% entity, the number of instances must be %operator% %value%
